title: rosa micrantha var. aciculata
intro: Rosa micrantha var. aciculata, also known as the Prickly Rose, is a subspecies of the Rosa micrantha plant, a flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties due to its high concentration of salicylic acid and phenolic compounds. The health benefits of Rosa micrantha var. aciculata include reducing pain and inflammation, as well as treating skin conditions such as acne and eczema. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties for a range of health benefits.
